title: Inventory AMR surveillance data
outcome: A dated source inventory separating GLASS, laboratory, burden, and unusable sources.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for URL, methodology, grain, and limitations.
done_condition: Five sources classified as usable, limited, or rejected.

title: Compile GLASS AMR surveillance data with sub-national breakdown
outcome: A sub-national surveillance-coverage dataset documenting GLASS enrollment, reporting completeness, and quality scores.
validation_method: Replicator confirms GLASS enrollment status and reporting completeness against alternative sources.
done_condition: Surveillance dataset includes enrollment status, sub-national reporting indicator, and quality score with replication.

title: Map laboratory diagnostic capacity for AMR
outcome: A sub-national map of laboratories with bacterial culture and susceptibility testing capacity.
validation_method: Replicator validates lab-capacity classification against independent sources.
done_condition: Lab-capacity map includes culture and AST capability classification with replication.

title: Analyze AMR surveillance gaps relative to burden estimates
outcome: A surveillance-gap map comparing GLASS coverage and lab capacity to estimated AMR burden.
validation_method: Replicator confirms gap methodology and sensitivity to burden-estimate uncertainty.
done_condition: Gap map includes burden-uncertainty sensitivity and replication.

title: Red-team misuse of AMR surveillance data
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying misuses of surveillance-gap maps.
validation_method: Mitigations confirmed or publication blocked, then replicated.

title: Check whether outputs match AMR surveillance planning needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether gap maps change lab-network planning responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, misuse risk, then replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases, replicated field-reality review.
